home.title: Valora Group — AI that solves your everyday business pain points
home.description: Valora Group is a consulting AI company serving businesses worldwide. We find your pain points and wrap AI around them until they become your solution — automation, websites, and business modernization.

hero.titleA: We find what slows your business down —
hero.lead: Valora Group is an AI consultancy that transforms how businesses run. We find where you lose time, money, and momentum, then wrap AI around the problem until it becomes your solution — from automation to modern websites to bringing your operations up to date.
hero.note: We start by understanding the problem — not by selling a product.
hero.reach: AI solutions for your business — delivered across the globe.

painPoints.title: Every business runs on a set of small frustrations.
painPoints.lead: On their own they’re tolerable. Together they quietly drain time, money, and momentum. These are the ones we hear about most.

items.title: Manual updates that never end
items.description: Prices, inventory, content, records — kept in sync by hand, every day, forever.

items.title: Questions that pull people off real work
items.description: Staff interrupted to answer the same things, in every language, at every hour.

items.title: Tasks that pile up after hours
items.description: Work that only happens when someone remembers — or once it’s already late.

items.title: Tools that don’t talk to each other
items.description: A stack of apps that each hold a piece of the truth and none of the whole.

items.title: Answers that arrive too slowly
items.description: Customers and teams waiting on information a system could surface instantly.

items.title: Repetitive work no one should own
items.description: If it’s manual, repetitive, or slow, it’s a candidate for AI.

approach.title: We start with the problem, not the product.
approach.lead: AI is the tool. Your pain point is the focus. We build the solution into the places where the work actually happens — your website, your workflows — so the technology earns its keep every day instead of sitting on a shelf.

steps.title: Understand
steps.description: We sit with your business and map where it loses time, money, and momentum — before a line of code is written.

steps.title: Design the fit
steps.description: We shape an AI solution around how your business actually works — not a generic product you have to bend yourself around.

steps.title: Build it in
steps.description: We embed the solution directly into your website and workflows — the places where the work happens.

steps.title: Earn its keep
steps.description: We make sure it pays off every day, then refine it as your business grows.

services.title: AI, built into the work.
services.lead: Different businesses, different pain points — but one approach: we wrap AI around the problem. Here’s the kind of work we take on.

items.title: Brand-aware assistants
items.description: Always-on assistants in your customers’ language and your brand’s voice, around the clock — like the one on this page.

items.title: Automation
items.description: The repetitive, after-hours, behind-the-scenes work — wrapped in AI so it runs without anyone having to remember.

items.title: Websites & digital products
items.description: Modern, fast, AI-ready websites and tools — built to work as hard as your team does.

items.title: Business modernization
items.description: Dated, disconnected operations brought into one intelligent system that runs as one.

items.title: Automated pricing & valuations
items.description: Prices and valuations that update themselves as live data moves — no manual edits.

items.title: Custom AI integrations
items.description: Whatever the workflow — if it’s manual, repetitive, or slow, we wrap AI around it.

caseStudy.title: When prices track a live market, the work can’t be manual.
caseStudy.lead: Fernando Piero is a Colombian fine-jewelry house. The challenge wasn’t “we need AI” — it was a set of very specific frictions. Here’s what we solved.

solutions.title: Prices that follow the market
solutions.problem: Valuations had to track a live commodity market — and were being edited by hand.
solutions.solution: We built a system that updates valuations automatically as the market moves, eliminating constant manual edits.

solutions.title: Answers in any language, any hour
solutions.problem: Customers needed answers in their own language, around the clock.
solutions.solution: We embedded a brand-aware assistant that handles it 24/7 — in the customer’s language and the house’s voice.

solutions.title: Operations that run as one
solutions.problem: Disconnected operations needed to work together.
solutions.solution: We unified them into a single intelligent system.

caseStudy.outcome: Different business, different pain points — but the same approach we bring to every client: understand first, then build the solution into the work.

whyValora.title: Technology that earns its keep.
whyValora.lead: We’re not here to sell you a product. We’re here to remove friction.

points.title: Problem-first, always
points.description: We start by understanding the pain point — not by reaching for a tool we already wanted to sell.

points.title: Built into your business
points.description: Solutions live inside your website and workflows, where the work actually happens — not on a shelf.

points.title: Industry-agnostic
points.description: Jewelry, services, commerce — whatever the industry, repetitive and slow work has a smarter version.

points.title: Measured by impact
points.description: If it doesn’t save time, money, or momentum, it isn’t done.

faq.title: What people ask before we start.

items.q: Do I need to know what AI I want?
items.a: No. Most clients come to us with a frustration, not a spec. We start by understanding the problem and recommend the AI only once we know what’s actually slowing you down.

items.q: What kind of businesses do you work with?
items.a: We’re industry-agnostic. If your business has work that’s repetitive, manual, or slow, there’s almost always a smarter way to run it — and that’s the work we’re here for.

items.q: Where does the AI actually live?
items.a: Inside your business — your website, your workflows, the places where the work happens. We build it in so it earns its keep daily, instead of sitting on a shelf.
A short discovery conversation. We map where you lose time, money, and momentum, then come back with a focused plan and the highest-impact place to start.

items.q: Can the assistant work in more than one language?
items.a: Yes. The brand-aware assistant on this very site is an example — it answers in English and Spanish, in our voice, at any hour.

contact.title: Tell us where your business loses time.
contact.lead: Describe the friction — the manual task, the slow answer, the tool that won’t cooperate. We’ll come back with where AI can help and where to start.

footer.tagline: AI that solves everyday business pain points.
footer.madeWith: This site runs on the same kind of AI we build for clients — ask the assistant.

chat.title: Valora Assistant
chat.subtitle: Brand-aware · EN / ES · 24/7
chat.greeting: Hi — I’m Valora’s assistant, and I’m an example of what we build. Ask me how we solve business pain points, about the Fernando Piero project, or how to get started.
chat.disclaimer: AI assistant — answers may not be perfect. For specifics, start a conversation with the team.
suggestions: Tell me about the Fernando Piero project
chat.error: I hit a snag. Please try again in a moment.

meta.title: Fernando Piero case study — Valora Group
meta.description: How Valora Group solved Fernando Piero’s frictions: automatic valuations tied to a live market, a brand-aware multilingual assistant, and unified operations.

caseStudyPage.title: A jewelry house whose prices follow a live market.
caseStudyPage.lead: Fernando Piero didn’t come asking for “AI.” They came with three concrete frictions that cost time and accuracy every day. Here’s what we built.
challengeBody: Fernando Piero sells fine jewelry, where the value of a piece is tied to live commodity markets. That created a quiet, constant tax on the business: prices had to be re-checked and re-entered by hand as the market moved, and any lag meant selling at the wrong number.
On top of that, customers arrived from different countries and time zones expecting answers in their own language — and the systems running the business each held a separate piece of the picture.

solutions.title: Valuations that update themselves
solutions.body: We built a system that tracks the live commodity market and updates valuations automatically as it moves. The manual re-pricing — and the risk that came with it — simply went away.

solutions.title: A brand-aware assistant, in any language, 24/7
solutions.body: We embedded an assistant grounded in the house’s voice and catalog. It answers customer questions around the clock, in the customer’s own language, the way the brand would.

solutions.title: One intelligent system
solutions.body: We unified the disconnected operations into a single system, so pieces that used to work in isolation now run as one.

caseStudyPage.approachNote: We didn’t start with a product. We started with three frictions — and handed each one to AI built to fit the house.
caseStudyPage.closingBody: Whatever your industry, if your business runs on work that’s repetitive, manual, or slow, there’s almost always a smarter way to run it. That’s the work we’re here for.
caseStudyPage.cta: Tell us where you lose time
